title: AllTheMons x Mega Showdown - Radiants
description: Extra rare Shinies, Radiant Pokemon. Pack by Sky, implimentation method idea by Davrial, code correction assistance by Gertimoshka
body:
## What is AllTheMons x Mega Showdown - Radiants?
This pack is an addon for AllTheMons x Mega Showdown that adds new radiant Pokémon that are 5x rarer than regular shinies! While some of these new colorations will have a few references in them, others will just be new colors and with regular updates the entire pokedex could eventually be radiant!

## How to install:
<details>
<summary>Click for instructions!</summary>

### Singleplayer:
**Put the .zip in `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks`**  
**Put the .zip in `/resourcepacks`**  
**Enable in game `ESC - Options - Resource Packs`**  

### Servers:
**Put the .zip in `/world/datapacks`**    
_Sometimes it's called myworld, or something similar, sometimes it has a name instead_    
_If you're in doubt about the correct folder, consult your server providers guide on how to add datapacks_  

**Every Player has to have the .zip installed as a `Resource Pack`**  
_Best option if for them to have it installed and enabled in their clients_    
_It's possible to add them to server resources, but note that there have been issues with this for some cobblemon addons, so try whatever method suits you better_  
</details>

## How to obtain a radiant?
- Every shiny that spawns has a 1/5 chance of being radiant
- Or you spawn them with via: `/pokespawn [Pokemon] shiny radiant=radiant` 

## Wanna see all designs?
[My Thread](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1411362456877400216) on the official Cobblemon Discord Server has every texture I ever made _(they will be posted here after i get some nice in game screenshots)_    
I will be posting new ones in there before the updates drop so you will see sneaks there too & the secrets behind some of the designs and some easter eggs, these arent normal shinys theres some new stuff too! I encourage you guys to talk there btw!
## This is an offical [AllTheMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) addon now!
This means I will be able to include not only base Cobblemon mons, but eventually all the custom ones added by AllTheMons (x Mega Showdown) so I suggest downloading ATM (x MSD) if you want to see radiants for all non-cobblemon mons!

## Compatible/Suggested Addons:
- [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) by **Lvnatic** and lots of other contributors! _(more or less required for most mons)_
- [Cobblemotion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemotion) by **Lenkagari**
 used for the Cobblemotion version
- [Navas' ZAmega](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega) by **GrenCobblemon**, **hugoarts**, **natusue233**, **Radowkage** and **sishengruyu**
- [Fires Pokemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/firespokemons) by **fire_jaguar**, **Alonzurro**, **ASHISK** and **FloppaTyann**
- [Beyond our Stars](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-beyond-the-stars) by **InsaneGamerBoy0** and **Miss_Verge**
- [Lasers Fakemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lasers-fakemon-pack) by **Lasercraft32**
- [Improvedmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-improvedmon) by **FlameGlares** and **B4st10n**
- [Alatia's Fakemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-alatias-fakemon-pack) by **Doctor_X**, **FloppaTyann** and **FumpleWumper**
 
## Compatible/Suggested Mods:
- [Unchained](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-unchained) adds a ko and capture streak mechanic that boosts shiny odds, the spawns of the pokemon in the streak, ivs and hidden abiltys! extremely useful for hunting down the radiants you want!
- [Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-counter)
a counter for those said streaks so you can keep track
- [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)
just a must have mod in general, needed for the megas and gmax radiants if you want them 
- [Sirdoof](https://modrinth.com/mod/sirdoof)
for the special radiant bidoof with a hat

## Permissions & License _(for usage on modpacks and public servers)_
<details>
<summary>Click to unfold!</summary>
  
All Developers of these packs gave their full permission for their assets to be used, proof of these can be found within the offical [AllTheMons addon file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JV5dvqVX/versions/ulwWbVUc/AllTheMons%20Release%202.4.zip), in a folder titled _"Proofs of Permission"_  
Since this addon is a derivative of AllTheMons and AllTheMons x Mega Showdown, it abides by its license.  
Due to the collaborative effort, AllTheMons has a **strict** license to make this even possible in the first place. Read it before starting a server or modpack containing the addon. You can find it [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tPvYDxqcby4cU0LlDGnxFKE-_fZ7GSg733G7MBN8Dos/edit?tab=t.y0gf8gi0vspf).
</details>
